title: Audit Entry
description: One immutable audit log row capturing a mutating action in the ops platform. Persisted append-only to output/ops_platform/audit/{YYYY-MM-DD}.jsonl.

actor.description: Who performed the action. 'name' is the only required field; 'system' marks automated origin.

action.description: Verb naming what happened. Lowercase, underscore-delimited.

previous_state.description: Snapshot of the relevant fields before the action. May be null for pure-create actions.

new_state.description: Snapshot of the relevant fields after the action. May be null for delete actions.

correlation_id.description: Optional grouping id so chains of related actions can be replayed together.

metadata.description: Free-form context the action handler wants to attach (reason, ip, request_id, etc).
